name: North Queensland Metals Limited
description: North Queensland Metals Limited (NQM) was an Australia-based mining and exploration company headquartered in Townsville, Queensland. The company focused on the exploration, development, and operation of mineral projects, with a primary emphasis on gold production. Throughout its operational history, the company was involved in various mining activities in Northern Queensland, including the development of gold and base metal assets. North Queensland Metals Limited was listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) under the ticker symbol NQM before being delisted following the conclusion of its corporate activities and business operations.
